fires.name: Nebraska Panhandle Fires
fires.summary: Largest wildfire in Nebraska history, burning over 640,000 acres with 1 fatality. Conditions beginning to ease. 15% contained.

fires.name: Colorado Wildfires (south of Colorado Springs/near I-90)
fires.summary: Multiple active wildfires in Colorado including fire near Colorado 115 that broke containment with ongoing evacuations, and fires near Jefferson County.

fires.name: Belmore State Forest Wildfire
fires.summary: Large wildfire in Belmore State Forest, Clay County. Fire Rescue working on containment.

fires.name: Casper Area Wildfire
fires.summary: Wildfire near Casper prompting evacuations amid record-high temperatures.

fires.name: Sevier County Wildfire
fires.summary: 50-acre wildfire in Sevier County driven by winds, putting structures at risk.

fires.name: Darlington County Wildfire
fires.summary: Large wildfire in Darlington County, South Carolina.

fires.name: Lahaina Wildfire (aftermath)
fires.summary: Recovery and rebuilding efforts ongoing following 2023 Lahaina wildfire. Bracing for rain impacts on burn scars.

fires.name: Sandia Crest Area Mitigation
fires.summary: Sandia Crest to partially close until 2027 for wildfire mitigation work.

notes: Deduped: 'Invasive grasses' article appeared in both canada and world feeds - kept Canada source (National Observer) as primary with most recent publish date 2026-03-21
Deduped: Two Saskatchewan wildfire funding articles (CBC vs Global News) - kept Global News as most recent (2026-03-20)
Rerouted: Smithers BC wildfire hardening guide moved from world to context reference
Rerouted: Future of Good Indigenous communities article kept in world as policy-focused rather than incident reporting
Merged Nebraska fires articles across multiple sources into single active fire entry
Merged Colorado wildfires (115 fire and I-90 incidents) into regional entry
Preserved active fires: Nebraska Panhandle (15% contained, 1 death), new Colorado/Florida/Wyoming/Utah/SC incidents
Contained fires retained: Chile Biobío-Ñuble (100% contained, historical), Victoria Australia (100% contained, January 2026)
Filtered: Policy/funding articles, rebuilding retrospectives, and environmental analysis pieces excluded from world_fires list as non-incident reporting
